lead_profile_text: 2-bed, 1-bath property with open-plan kitchen/living, private garden and driveway. Recently renovated and fully furnished. Owner splits time between the UK and Qatar — needs completely hands-off management. Property already set up with only minor gaps (kitchen essentials, hair dryer).
emotional_profile: Remote owner motivated by hands-off management and strong income surplus over mortgage. Long-let does not cover the £475 mortgage; STL creates ~£859/month surplus. Decision urgency: expected same-day after one internal company meeting.
delay_trigger_phrases: one more company meeting today before deciding
green_light_trigger_phrases: want to decide by end of today

top_objections.text: Can the property be genuinely managed hands-off while splitting time between the UK and Qatar?
top_objections.zac_response: Single Slack channel for all communications; full-service management covering listings, pricing, check-in/out, cleaning, and repairs.

top_objections.text: Income consistency through quieter winter months
top_objections.zac_response: November floor ~£1,049 net — still above the £475 mortgage. Even worst month comfortably covers costs.

top_objections.text: Getting the right type of guest and protecting the property from damage
top_objections.zac_response: ID verification, booking history screening, deposit protection. Low local competition means quality bookings at target rates.

top_questions.text: What are all the costs deducted from gross revenue?
top_questions.answer: Management fee 13%+VAT, cleaning fee passed through, £42/month software charge. Owner responsible for mortgage, insurance, gas safety, council tax, utilities.

top_questions.text: How fast can the property go live?
top_questions.answer: Two-week setup from agreement to live — property already furnished so no major setup delays beyond minor essential items list.

what_moved_them: Short-let covering the mortgage with ~£859/month surplus where long-let does not even cover the £475 mortgage
Fully hands-off operation via a single Slack channel — critical for remote owner
Low local competition and clear path to 20+ reviews within 4–6 months
Fast two-week setup with property already furnished
what_fell_flat: West Midlands demand-drivers incorrectly cited in web-meeting presentation slide (corrected in action plan and flagged honestly in follow-up)

conversion_gaps.gap: Presentation credibility dented by wrong demand-drivers slide (West Midlands locations listed for a Hull property)
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Flagged honestly in follow-up email. Action plan corrected to accurate Hull drivers: Castle Hill Hospital, Hull Royal Infirmary, University of Hull, Siemens Gamesa, P&O Hull-Rotterdam ferry.

offer_framing: 13%+VAT (from 15%), expires 15 June 2026. Core framing: long-let doesn't cover the mortgage; STL creates £859/month surplus. Hands-off operation for remote owner.
zac_close_phrase: Decision expected end of today — offer expires 15 June to lock in the rate
zac_income_intro: Short-term rental projected net ~£1,400/month (65% occupancy, £136 nightly rate); traditional long-term rent ~£750/month gross leaving only £200–300/month profit after mortgage, maintenance and agent fees.
zac_transition_phrases: Single Slack channel — everything managed from one place
Low local competition — clear path to 20+ reviews within 4–6 months
zac_reassurance_phrases: November floor ~£1,049 net — still above your £475 mortgage even in the quietest month
ltl_monthly: £750 gross (~£250 net after mortgage, maintenance, agent fees)
